articles.title: KJ Alphons Slams Congress Over Shashi Tharoor Rift - No Space for Intelligent Debate in the Party
articles.summary: Former Union Minister KJ Alphons criticizes Congress over the rift with Shashi Tharoor, stating there is no space for intelligent debate within the party.

articles.title: Kerala PFI March Video Goes Viral; BJP's KJ Alphons Calls Act ...
articles.summary: BJP leader KJ Alphons responds to viral video of PFI march in Kerala, calling for radical action against the group, describing it as a huge danger to Kerala and the country.
